name: H2O Isolation Forest
description: Isolation Forest is an unsupervised learning algorithm for anomaly detection that isolates observations by randomly selecting a feature and then randomly selecting a split value.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: sampleSize
fields.title: Sample Size
fields.description: Number of randomly sampled observations used to train each tree. 256 is the recommended default.

fields.name: sampleRate
fields.title: Sample Rate
fields.description: Row sample rate per tree (from 0.0 to 1.0). If set, sample size is ignored.

fields.name: featuresCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: Features to be used for identifying anomalies.

fields.name: mtries
fields.title: mtries
fields.description: Number of variables randomly sampled as candidates at each split. -1 defaults to 1.

fields.name: contamination
fields.title: Contamination
fields.description: Expected proportion of anomalies in the dataset (e.g., 0.01 for 1%). Set to -1 to only get anomaly scores without classification.

fields.name: ntrees
fields.title: Number of Trees
fields.description: Number of trees in the forest. More trees increase stability.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Maximum tree depth. Standard default is log2(sampleSize).

fields.name: minRows
fields.title: Min Rows
fields.description: Fewest allowed observations in a leaf node.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: buildTreeOneNode
fields.title: Build tree one node
fields.description: Forces tree building to run on a single node (not distributed).

fields.name: colSampleRatePerTree
fields.title: Column Sample Rate Per Tree
fields.description: Column subsampling rate per tree.

fields.name: colSampleRateChangePerLevel
fields.title: Column Sample Rate change Per Level
fields.description: Relative change of column sampling rate for every level.

fields.name: scoreTreeInterval
fields.title: Score Tree Interval
fields.description: Score the model after every N trees. 0 disables this.

fields.name: categoricalEncoding
fields.title: Categorical Encoding
fields.description: Encoding scheme for handling categorical features.

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Const Columns
fields.description: Whether to discard constant columns (columns with only one value).

fields.name: ignoredCols
fields.title: Ignore Columns
fields.description: Columns to exclude from modeling.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric or String columns that should be treated as categorical factors/enums.

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Enable to score the model during each training iteration.

fields.name: stoppingRounds
fields.title: Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stop training if performance doesn't improve for N rounds. 0 to disable.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: stoppingMetric
fields.title: Stopping Metric
fields.description: Metric to monitor for early stopping.

fields.name: stoppingTolerance
fields.title: Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: Relative tolerance for metric improvement.

fields.name: paramKeys
fields.title: Param Name
fields.description: Select the hyperparameters to tune.

fields.name: paramValues
fields.title: Param Value
fields.description: Enter comma-separated values for the selected keys.

fields.name: gridStrategy
fields.title: Grid Search Strategy
fields.description: 'Cartesian' tests every combination. 'RandomDiscrete' stops after a specific limit.

fields.name: gridMaxModels
fields.title: Grid Max Models
fields.description: Limits total models in RandomDiscrete search. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: gridMaxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Grid Max Runtime Seconds
fields.description: Limits search time in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: gridStoppingRounds
fields.title: Grid Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stops grid search if performance doesn't improve for N rounds.

fields.name: gridStoppingTolerance
fields.title: Grid Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: The minimum improvement required to continue searching.

fields.name: gridStoppingMetric
fields.title: Grid Stopping Metric
fields.description: The metric used to determine if the grid search should stop early.

fields.name: gridParallelism
fields.title: Grid Parallelism
fields.description: Number of models to train in parallel during search.

fields.name: gridSelectBestModelBy
fields.title: Grid Select Best Model By
fields.description: Metric used to select the best model from the grid.
